programmes.show_description: When Alf Garnett is given a cordless telephone it turns out to be more of a hindrance than a help. S3 E3
With The Moody Blues and David Essex. The legendary BAFTA-winning music and comedy show from Thames TV (1979). All in the best possible taste!
Simon meets a young woman on a plane - and flies into drama stemming from the death of the woman's brother and into a flashback to wartime resistance heroism. S1 E4: The Covetous Headsman
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!

Your favourite music from the 1960s - non-stop.
After the Romanovs were executed, rumours claimed Anastasia survived. Anna Anderson later emerged as a claimant. Narrated by Robert Powell.
From attacks on Pearl Harbor to the British Mediterranean Fleet and the Tirpitz, midget submarines played their part in some of the most gripping stories of the war. Ep2: Midget Submarines
From undercover agents in the French Resistance to women who were willing to get under the covers in exchange for military secrets, discover the secret world of women at war. E3: Women Spies of WW2
The soldiers whose name has become a synonym for heroism and tackling the seemingly impossible; what was the task of the SAS, Britain's elite military force, in World War II? Ep3: SAS

The B-25, often called 'the forgotten bomber', the mighty North American twin delivered the first blow in the fight back against Japan, in one of the most daring and audacious raids of all time. S2 E3
The battle progresses from the ground to the sky as the British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns. Ep2: Battle of Britain
The course of the fight by the British and American navies against the German submarine U-Boat threat - a tense cat-and-mouse struggle that by the end of the war had cost over 100,000 lives.
Examining the history of war tactics. Winning a swift victory by catching the enemy unawares is one of any commander's great dreams. S1 E9
Exploring medieval London, what Westminster Abbey reveals about the competition between the crown and the city, the cellars below the Ministry of Defence and artefacts owned by Henry VIII. Ep2

The US Air Force finds itself flying planes older than the pilots - where do the strategic bomber, and its little brother the fighter bomber, fit into 21st-century warfare? E3: The High Ground vs. SAM
Even the most powerful WWII warships had their weaknesses - we see a North Atlantic search for HMS Hood and the German battleship HMS Bismarck. Ep3: Last Days of the Battleship
It was Hitler's deadliest secret - his scientists had promised him an atomic bomb and Nazi domination was assured if he got it first.
Bill sets up another shop in Gallowshields, and Jack and Dolly get ready for a night out with the Duke of Bedlington. S2 E8: Ladies, Women, Sweethearts & Wives
Arthur comes back to earth with a bump when he learns that he faces tough opposition for the Daley inheritance. S9 E12: A Taste of Money
Ross closes Wheal Grace for good; with Elizabeth wrestling with a life-changing decision, Demelza's world has been turned upside down. Starring Aidan Turner. S2 E9
Drama series about a detective who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. When a man's wife and daughter are kidnapped and held hostage, Sam tries to focus on the investigation. Starring John Simm. S2 E5
Gwenneth and Min come to visit Alf. They decide to hold a seance to talk to long departed friends. S3 E4
With Freddie Mercury, Gary Numan, The Shadows and The Pretenders. The legendary BAFTA-winning comedy extravaganza from Thames TV (1980) - and all in the best possible taste!
Simon witnesses a murder and finds himself in the midst of a mystery involving a faithless wife and smuggled jewels. S1 E5: The Loaded Tourist

The Red Baron, Germany's top WWI ace, was shot down in 1918. Though he landed his plane, he died soon after but was it accidental? Narrated by Robert Powell.
When it was impossible for aircraft to land safely on enemy territory, gliders were the perfect answer for delivering special forces behind enemy lines. Ep3: Gliders
This episode focuses on the tools of espionage employed by both the Allies and the Axis during WW2. E4: Weapons of the Shadow War
We look at the British Armoured Division, known as the Desert Rats, who conducted an epic campaign against Rommel's Axis forces in the deserts of Egypt and Libya. Ep4: Desert Rats
The many variants of the A-1 Skyraider single piston-engined fighter bomber helped dominate the air to ground attack role in Vietnam and earned quite the reputation. S2 E4
As the incredible stories of those at sea are heard, relentless attacks by U-boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat the Nazi empire. Ep3: U-Boat Terror
Operation Market Garden was an attempt by the allies to use airborne units to seize key bridges and short cut the attack into northern Germany. We look at the plan, leaders and the weapons involved.
Examining the history of war tactics. We explore the use of aerial battles, including the Battle of Britain in 1940, in military conflicts. S1 E10
A look at how the West End became a place for the wealthy elite, the impact of the railways, a cholera epidemic and engineer Joseph Bazalgette saving London with his new sewerage system. Ep3
The Supermarine Spitfire aircraft begged the question of how important air combat is in WWII - it has been clear that dominating the skies is essential in battle since then. E4: Pure Fighter
We search for remains of warships from WWI and WWII in the remote Pacific and the Atlantic while revealing new insights into how the atomic bomb changed the world forever. Ep4: Nuclear Wrecks
The Resistance asked for help in late 1943 as some of their top operatives were being held in Amiens prison and needed rescuing from facing interrogation, torture and execution. Ep2: Prison Busters
Jack develops a taste for the high life, but it proves too rich for Dolly. S2 E9: After the Bonfire
Penniless and facing the threat of deportation from Australia, Ray and Arthur must try to raise funds for a return airfare home. S9 E13: For a Few Dollars More
Dwight enlists in the navy to forget Caroline, and Demelza visits Verity to spend some time apart from Ross while he considers rejoining his regiment. Starring Aidan Turner. S2 E10

Drama series about a detective who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. As heroin hits the streets of Manchester, CID want culprits for the smuggling, dealing and ensuing violence. With John Simm. S2 E6
